sender.name: Tom Hidderley
sender.signature:
Tom Hidderley
Creative Director & Founder, Studio IOS
studioios.com

tier_proof.T1: We've built the apparel direction and graphic language behind FUJI Sports' competition and lifestyle programmes and Phalanx's combat-sports ranges — both running at retail with style-guide-grade consistency.
tier_proof.T2: We helped FUJI and Phalanx hit 15–18% seasonal revenue uplifts by getting trend direction in before the brief, not after. Phalanx's last preorder window covered inventory and our fees before launch day.
tier_proof.T3: We've worked with the brands you'd recognise in the BJJ space — FUJI and Phalanx among them. We know the culture, and we know what moves units in it.
